title: Update opencontainers/image-spec
body:
... to a version past 1.0.2, just to keep various dependency checkers happy (and to have the NOTE below visible).

> go get github.com/opencontainers/image-spec@v1.0.2-0.20211123152302-43a7dee1ec31

The commit is intended to match https://github.com/containers/image/pull/1419 to minimize churn.

NOTE: This is NOT a fix for CVE-2021-41190 / GHSA-77vh-xpmg-72qh , that was fixed in Skopeo 1.5.2.

comments.body: I have also added a containerd bump (which literally changes not a line of code), just to be done with this.
@mtrmac I think this addresses https://bugzilla.redhat.com/show_bug.cgi?id=2026062, can you confirm or deny please?

> @mtrmac I think this addresses https://bugzilla.redhat.com/show_bug.cgi?id=2026062, can you confirm or deny please?

No; as the PR description explicitly warns, that was fixed in Skopeo 1.5.2 by updating to c/image 5.17.0.
